movie.synopsis: The SpongeBob Movie Search for SquarePants (2025) Desperate to be a big guy, Sponge Bob sets out to prove his bravery to Mr. Krabs by following The Flying Dutchman – a mysterious swashbuckling ghost pirate – on a seafaring adventure that takes him to the deepest depths of the deep sea, where no Sponge has gone before.
